name: Straight-Leg Up Crunch
shortDescription: A crunch variant with straight legs held vertically to challenge upper abdominals.
instructions: Lie on your back with legs straight up in the air, arms at your sides or behind your head. Engage your core to lift your head, neck, and shoulders toward your feet, then lower back down with control.
steps: Lie on back, legs straight up, feet flexed.
Place arms beside you or hands behind head.
Engage core, lift head and shoulders toward legs.
breathing: Exhale as you crunch up, inhale as you lower down.
